overall.description: A cinematic third-person game sequence following a character through a dark mountainous environment at night. The character navigates from a narrow rocky passage through a wooden corridor and emerges into an open mountainside with dramatic stormy skies, passing lanterns and entering a pine forest area.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark rocky passage with steep cliff walls on both sides. The sky is barely visible overhead. The character passes a stationary figure standing in the path and approaches a wooden structure entrance at the end of the ravine.

exiting dark corridor into open air with dramatic sky visibility

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark enclosed corridor with wooden planks covering the ground and rock walls on both sides. The space is dimly lit until approaching the exit where light becomes visible. The character moves through the narrow wooden passage and emerges at the far end.

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark corridor into a wide open mountainside with a dramatic stormy sky overhead. Wooden fence posts line the right side of the dirt path. The character passes lit lanterns and a distant campfire glow on the left while traversing the rocky terrain with distant mountains visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with pine trees

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the last lanterns and enters a more natural forested environment. The wooden barriers give way to grassy hillsides and tall pine trees lining the dirt trail. The rocky cliffs continue on the left while the path winds through the open mountain forest under the stormy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic rocky ravine through a dark corridor and out into a vast, stormy mountainside. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage between steep cliff walls, passing a stationary figure before approaching a wooden structure. As the character enters the enclosed wooden corridor, the space remains dimly lit until the camera moves toward the exit where light begins to break through. The scene then opens abruptly into a wide mountain landscape under a dramatic stormy sky, where the character traverses a dirt path lined with wooden fence posts and glowing lanterns. Finally, the rocky terrain shifts into a natural forest environment as the path winds past grassy hillsides and tall pine trees beneath the dark night sky.
